scope: Committed Grid region PNG, ZIP+manifest artifact, Export workspace and canonical Compose handoff.

zipDownload.byteSizeNote: Observed value; UUIDs and ZIP compression make byte size non-invariant.

ZIP without provenance: unit contract inspects manifest region, asset and bounds entries.

Happy-path-only cancellation: the ExportPort cancellation test asserts no writer call after an aborted request.
